candidates.title: vastu & Wellness Video Editor Wanted
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro — for video/motion editing
candidates.brief: Freelance Video Editor Needed for Vastu, Spiritual & Wellness Content (Long-Term) We are looking for a reliable and creative video editor for a growing Vastu and Healing brand. Our content includes Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, educational videos, podcasts, client stories, and spiritual/wellness content. What we need: • Editing short-form videos (30–90 sec reels) • Editing long-form videos and podcasts • Professional captions/subtitles • Smooth transitions and clean storytelling • Relevant stock footage/B-roll integration • Audio enhancement and basic color correction • Thumbnail creation is a bonus Style Preference: We want premium, professional, trustworthy content. Not overly flashy or meme-style editing. Think clean, modern, educational, spiritual, and engaging. Expected Volume: • 15–30 reels per month • 2–4 long-form videos/podcasts per month Requirements: • Experience with Premi

candidates.title: Engaging Video Editor for GEN Checkup
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro — for video/motion editing
candidates.brief: Hi, We are looking for a creative and experienced Video Editor to support our brand GEN Checkup, a Germany-based health, wellness, and genetic testing brand focused on personalized health and DNA-based insights. Our content is educational, engaging, and social-media driven, helping people better understand their health, supplements, and genetics. What We Are Looking For We need a Video Editor with strong storytelling and AI-content editing skills who can create both: Short-form social media videos (Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, TikTok-style edits) Long-form YouTube videos with engaging pacing, storytelling, and audience retention techniques. Important GEN Checkup is a German brand, so most of the videos will be in German language. You do not necessarily need to speak fluent German, but experience editing German-speaking content and working with subtitles, pacing, and social-media styl

candidates.title: UGC Ad Video Editor for Meta, Google
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro — for layered/retouched assets and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: **Title:** UGC Video Editor Needed for Meta & Google Ads (Short Form Video Specialist) **Job Description:** We are looking for a skilled **UGC Video Editor** who can create high-converting advertising videos for our clients and brands. ### Responsibilities: * Edit UGC-style videos for Meta (Facebook & Instagram) Ads and Google Ads. * Combine multiple images, short video clips, product photos, screenshots, and stock footage into engaging ad creatives. * Add captions, motion graphics, transitions, hooks, and call-to-action elements. * Create short-form videos (15 sec, 30 sec, 60 sec). * Optimize videos for higher CTR, engagement, and conversions. ### Requirements: * Experience editing UGC and direct-response ad creatives. * Knowledge of Meta Ads and Google Ads video requirements. * Ability to create scroll-stopping hooks in the first 3 seconds. * Experience with CapCut, Premiere Pro, After

candidates.title: Real Estate Reels Video Editing
candidates.tools: Premiere Pro · Animate — for video/motion editing
candidates.brief: Each week I shoot short real-estate clips that I later turn into 30-60 second Instagram Reels. I need an experienced video editor who can take these rough takes, strip out background noise and room echo, and then layer on engaging visuals, crisp captions, and tasteful sound effects so the finished Reel keeps viewers glued from the first second to the last. Here’s how the workflow usually looks on my end: I’ll send you the raw footage together with a brief script that outlines the storyline or hook—for example highlighting a property’s hidden feature, a quick market tip, or a neighborhood surprise. Your task is to build the situational edit around that script, making sure the pacing matches the platform and the real-estate niche. Technical expectations • Audio cleanup: remove hiss, hum, wind, and slap-back echoes without sacrificing voice clarity. • Visual polish: color-grade for bright,

candidates.title: Instagram Revamp for Construction Brand (espacio gradnja doo)
candidates.tools: Premiere Pro · Lightroom · Photoshop — Reels/video edits (.mp4) in Premiere; Lightroom to cull/grade hundreds of site photos; Photoshop for feed templates (.psd/.ai).
candidates.brief: Espacio Gradnja has hundreds of photographs and videos of completed construction and electrical work. The client needs an expert to organize this raw material into a professional, minimalist-style Instagram profile. Tasks: 1) Review all content and sort by project and quality; 2) Create a clear visual grid/feed layout reflecting technical precision; 3) Design static posts from selected photos and video clips; 4) Create Reels focused exclusively on showcasing completed projects; 5) Develop clean templates with a restrained colour palette and brief Serbian-language captions ready for the client's independent posting; 6) Deliver finished visuals and video edits (.psd/.ai + .mp4), short SEO-friendly descriptions with hashtag sets, and instructions (PDF or Loom video) for maintaining style and posting schedule. candidates.title: Facebook & Instagram Ad Content Creation
candidates.brief: I’m focusing my digital marketing efforts entirely on social media and I need a creative partner who can turn Facebook and Instagram into reliable lead-generating channels. The scope is limited to paid placements, so everything you produce should be designed for Ads Manager rather than organic posts. My priorities: • Advertisements that meet each platform’s best-practice specs (static or carousel visuals paired with concise, persuasive copy). • Short-form videos and Reels, 15-30 seconds each, formatted 1:1 and 9:16, ready for split-testing. • All source files and export presets so I can update or localise assets later. You’ll handle concept development, copywriting, graphic design or basic video editing (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or any comparable tool), and delivery of final creatives in ready-to-upload formats.
